register.note: it needs a bit more visual polish - the split-screen views in e.g. neural network fundamentals are much cleaner. and the labels should be clearer with 'train error' and 'test error'

The lab grammar is held exactly — blue prediction line, amber observed points, red reserved for honest test error, purple penalty lambda — with no all-red dilution and a bound colored 'Regularisation' term, carrying more semantic load cleanly than R2D3's two-hue scatter.

hero.note: A hero would need the existing degree-12 overfit curve (blue fit, amber train/test split, error-vs-lambda U) composed full-width above the prose with one annotated wiggle lobe and residual, legible as a thumbnail.

assessment.note: The Check keeps a hands-on lab task (B4, 'completed with your hands, not a click') and a persistent live dial, but the closing transfer item (B5) is still a 3-option MCQ rather than an interactive or open prompt.
